name: Farofa De Malagueta (Brazilian Chile Condimen
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat palm oil in a frying pan and fry onions until golden brown.
2. Add hard-boiled eggs and sauté the mixture for 1 minute.
3. Next, add the chiles and cassava flour, stirring constantly until the mixture turns golden.
Substitute piquin if malagueta chiles are unavailable.
Note: If palm oil is unavailable or a healthier alternative is desired, substitute vegetable oil with 3 teaspoons of paprika added.
